channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Deaths of migrants in ICE custody hit record high under Trump
item.description: Twenty-nine people have died in ICE custody since October, the start of the federal government's fiscal year, already surpassing 2004's toll of 28, the previous record, according to government data.
item.content:encoded:
Twenty-nine people have died in ICE custody since October, the start of the federal government's fiscal year, already surpassing 2004's toll of 28, the previous record, according to government data.

(Image credit: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Who says they have no fear of the Trump administration? The quiz knows
item.description: Also: If you know what Eric Swalwell looks like, you'll get at least one question correct.
item.content:encoded: Also: If you know what Eric Swalwell looks like, you'll get at least one question correct.
item.dc:creator: Holly J. Morris

item.title: Human rights groups raise alarm over fate of Salvadorans deported from U.S.
item.description: Migrants deported from the U.S. routinely disappear into El Salvador's prisons the moment they land or in the weeks that follow. Many remain incommunicado from family and lawyers for years.
item.content:encoded:
Migrants deported from the U.S. routinely disappear into El Salvador's prisons the moment they land or in the weeks that follow. Many remain incommunicado from family and lawyers for years.

(Image credit: Illustration by Jackie Lay/NPR)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Woman remembers her childhood babysitter -- Prince
item.description: For StoryCorps, a family that lived near Prince in Minnesota remembers the artist in his early years -- as their babysitter.
item.content:encoded: For StoryCorps, a family that lived near Prince in Minnesota remembers the artist in his early years -- as their babysitter.
item.dc:creator: Jo Corona

item.title: Trump rails against court decision that once again stalls his White House ballroom project
item.description: The federal judge's decision continues to block above-ground construction on the $400 million White House ballroom, allowing only below-ground work on a bunker and other "national security facilities" at the site.
item.content:encoded:
The federal judge's decision continues to block above-ground construction on the $400 million White House ballroom, allowing only below-ground work on a bunker and other "national security facilities" at the site.

(Image credit: Rod Lamkey)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Congress extends controversial surveillance powers for 10 days
item.description: Earlier in the morning GOP leaders had pushed for either a five-year renewal or the 18-month renewal President Trump had demanded, but both votes tanked.
item.content:encoded:
Earlier in the morning GOP leaders had pushed for either a five-year renewal or the 18-month renewal President Trump had demanded, but both votes tanked.

(Image credit: J. Scott Applewhite)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: Acting ICE director says he's resigning amid record-breaking shutdown
item.description: The departure adds to a string of recent personnel changes at the Department of Homeland Security, a year into President Trump's administration.
item.content:encoded:
The departure adds to a string of recent personnel changes at the Department of Homeland Security, a year into President Trump's administration.

(Image credit: Tom Brenner)
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo

item.title: Singer D4vd is arrested months after a teen's remains were found in his car
item.description: The 21-year-old Houston-born singer, whose real name is David Burke, had been under a secret investigation by an LA County grand jury after a 14-year-old girl's decomposed body was found in his car.
item.content:encoded:
The 21-year-old Houston-born singer, whose real name is David Burke, had been under a secret investigation by an LA County grand jury after a 14-year-old girl's decomposed body was found in his car.

(Image credit: Jordan Strauss/Invision/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: House passes bill extending protections for Haitian migrants in the U.S.
item.description: Ten Republicans voted alongside Democrats, in a rebuke to the Trump administration's immigration policies. Should it pass the Senate, the White House said President Trump would veto the measure.
item.content:encoded:
Ten Republicans voted alongside Democrats, in a rebuke to the Trump administration's immigration policies. Should it pass the Senate, the White House said President Trump would veto the measure.

(Image credit: Lynne Sladky)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: Georgia jail uses drones to block dangerous deliveries to inmates
item.description: The Fulton County jail in Georgia is using drones to intercept deliveries of dangerous contraband to inmates. The drones are made by Flock, a company under scrutiny for its surveillance reach.
item.content:encoded: The Fulton County jail in Georgia is using drones to intercept deliveries of dangerous contraband to inmates. The drones are made by Flock, a company under scrutiny for its surveillance reach.
item.dc:creator: Chamian Cruz
